violations.text: Per interview of staff, coffee pots/equipment/utensils are not sanitized after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Proper sanitizing of equipment and use of bleach testing strips (50-100ppm) was reviewed with the employee. Proper mixture of bleach and water made at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025

The 3 bay sink was observed to be lacking drain stoppers for use to hold water in the bays for proper sanitizing (submerging of equipment in water/sanitizer mix). Drain stoppers to be obtained. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

Wood is used in the construction of shelving in the ware washing room . Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Shelving to be sealed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
The 3-bay sink faucet was unable to fully reach all 3-bays. Establishment to replace the faucet to allow for it to reach all 3 bays. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
The floor and wall junctures under the mop sink do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
